The courtyard remembers... Everything we are, began in a home that breathed.

Which generation do you belong to?

Before the pharmacy arrived on every street corner, there was the kitchen. Before the kitchen emptied, there was someone who knew. This is a story about the distance between what she knew and what reached you.

Kadak Chai

Green Tea

Diet Coke

The Map of Memory

We asked 20 people — from the same families across three generations — which of these 7 remedies they knew, used, and would make today. The size shows how many remedies they actively use — not just recognise, not just remember hearing about, but would actually make at home if someone fell sick tonight.

Across The Generations: What We Lost

It happened meal by meal. Generation by generation. No announcement. No decision. Just one morning when nobody boiled the kadha and nobody noticed it was the last time.

Grandma’s Era
Parent’s Era
Our Era

Choose Your Remedy

Not in any book. Not in any app. In the way she said it while she was making something else. These are the ones that survived — passed from hand to hand, kitchen to kitchen, without ever being written down.

A Final Promise

don’t let the heritage fade into medicine.

Thank You.

Your memory is now woven into the Yard.
It will never be forgotten.
